scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage:unit: bun test src/lib src/middleware src/routes --coverage && mkdir -p coverage && mv coverage/lcov.info coverage/unit.lcov.info
scripts.test:coverage:integration: bun test src/integration --coverage && mkdir -p coverage && mv coverage/lcov.info coverage/integration.lcov.info
scripts.test:coverage: bun run test:coverage:unit && bun run test:coverage:integration && bun scripts/merge-lcov.ts coverage/lcov.info coverage/unit.lcov.info coverage/integration.lcov.info
